idea-plugin.name: Code Path Copy
idea-plugin.description:
Copy selected editor ranges as Codex-friendly file references, for example @/abs/path/File.java#L1-L10.

Code Path Copy can copy the reference to the clipboard or send it directly to a dedicated Codex CLI terminal tab.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Add configurable Codex command, startup delay, Desktop bundle ID, and selection hint toggle.
  • Only show editor actions when a file range is selected.
  • Add macOS Codex Desktop sending through clipboard and AppleScript paste automation.
  • Add open-source project documentation and CI workflow.

action.text: Send Code Path Reference to Codex
action.description: Send selected code reference to Codex CLI

action.text: Send Code Path Reference to Codex Desktop
action.description: Paste selected code reference into the macOS Codex desktop app
